name: gc
description: Garbage collector control: manual collection, memory stats, and threshold configuration.
differences_from_cpython: gc module is critical on memory-constrained ESP32. Call gc.collect() before memory-intensive operations.

functions.name: gc.collect
functions.description: Force garbage collection. Returns bytes freed.

functions.name: gc.threshold
functions.description: Get/set GC threshold. GC triggers when allocation exceeds threshold.

functions.name: gc.isenabled
functions.description: Check if automatic GC is enabled.

example:
import gc
gc.collect()
print('Free:', gc.mem_free(), 'Allocated:', gc.mem_alloc())
